scenario_title: Articulating complex thoughts during philosophical inquiry
minimal_context: The student is sitting in a circle during a Community of Philosophical Inquiry session and is asked to provide an argument about the stimulus text.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We are going to discuss the stimulus text we just read. Please share your thoughts with the circle.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Turns to the student sitting next to him) Hey, look at what I have over here. (Attempts to distract the other participant)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please focus on the discussion. What is your argument about the text?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Sometimes it’s really difficult, you need to follow the story and you need to think about what the person’s saying...

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just go ahead and tell us what you are thinking.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I can't do it! (Becomes visibly angry and frustrated, struggling to organize and convey his thoughts without a clear structure)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: We are going to discuss the stimulus text we just read. Please share your thoughts with the circle.

STUDENT: (Turns to the student sitting next to him) Hey, look at what I have over here. (Attempts to distract the other participant)

TUTOR: Please focus on the discussion. What is your argument about the text?

STUDENT: Sometimes it’s really difficult, you need to follow the story and you need to think about what the person’s saying...

TUTOR: Just go ahead and tell us what you are thinking.

STUDENT: I can't do it! (Becomes visibly angry and frustrated, struggling to organize and convey his thoughts without a clear structure)

task.content: Providing relevant philosophical arguments or points during the structured dialogue phase of a CoPI session.

context.social_setting: 1-hour weekly Community of Philosophical Inquiry (CoPI) session. The task involves sitting in a circle

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: Where he had previously found it difficult to organise and convey his thoughts
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: difficult to organise and convey his thoughts
related_quotes: It helps me think and I don’t get angry about it
Sometimes it’s really difficult, you need to follow the story and you need to think about what the person’s saying
